tagline: First sign detected, a life saved.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.startHealthCheckHint: Describe symptoms and get instant AI triage

errors.loadReminders: Reminders could not be loaded right now
errors.loadHistory: Medical history could not be loaded right now

landing.heroDescription: Ayushseva AI helps villagers, families, and officers detect health risks early, coordinate care, and follow treatment through reminders, alerts, and actionable insights.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything your community needs in one platform
landing.ctaDescription: Register now to access AI health triage, reminders, family coordination, and community-level support.

triage.title: AI Symptom Triage
triage.description: Enter symptoms in simple language and get risk level, guidance, and nearby hospital suggestions.

family.title: Family Health Groups
family.description: Create or join family groups so members can stay informed and act quickly during contagious risks.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders & Alerts
reminders.description: Get timely in-app reminders for follow-ups, checkups, and vaccine due dates.

officer.title: Officer Monitoring
officer.description: Village officers get dashboards and patient-level insights to support high-risk cases faster.

reports.title: Medical Report Analysis
reports.description: Upload medical reports and receive easy-to-understand AI summaries and recommendations.

step1.title: 1. Register & Set Profile
step1.description: Create your account with village details, language, and health context.

step2.title: 2. Use AI + Track Care
step2.description: Analyze symptoms, upload reports, and track family and reminders.

step3.title: 3. Act Early & Stay Safe
step3.description: Get alerts, follow recommendations, and connect with care quickly for high-risk cases.
